<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill out all sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is the change needed? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling / CI only

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` all pass locally.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover my changes.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` if public API changed.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] I did not introduce any `any` types.

## Screenshots / output (optional)

<!-- If UX/output changes, paste a snippet or screenshot. -->
